metadata.task_title: Adding an image to a PowerPoint Presentation Slide
metadata.instruction: Add the photo Task ID 62.jpg to Task ID 62.pptx, both in Document > Task 62 folder.
metadata.context: I want to add a picture of myself to the presentation

focused_element.name: Terminal 4, python Use Alt+F1 for terminal accessibility help
